name: Kyri Zaltazar
sd_appearance: A short, wiry kobold with scaly green skin, sharp yellow eyes, and a long, flickering forked tongue, Kyri Zaltazar is clad in a tattered coat of jade green and black divine silk over a threadbare robe, the Serpent Choir's coiled serpent motif evident on both. He carries a quill like a weapon, a parchment always tucked under his arm, and a hidden dagger at his waist. His long, forked tongue continually darts out, suggesting a mind always plotting and scheming.
faction_visual: jade green and black divine silk robes, coiled serpent motif, contract seals as pendants
style_note: coat over robe, always quill and parchment, forked tongue flickering
